result.stdout:
docx2html 1.0.0 - Convert Word documents to HTML

Usage:
  docx2html <input.docx> [output.html] [options]

Arguments:
  input.docx       Path to the input Word document
  output.html      Path for the output HTML file (default: input with .html extension)

Options:
  --title=<text>       Page title (default: document title or filename)
  --css-prefix=<text>  CSS class prefix (default: pt-)
  --inline-styles      Use inline styles instead of CSS classes
  --extract-images     Save images to separate files instead of embedding
  -h, --help           Show this help message
  -v, --version        Show version information

Examples:
  docx2html document.docx
  docx2html document.docx output.html
  docx2html document.docx --title="My Document"
  docx2html document.docx --extract-images --inline-styles

Environment Variables:
  DOCX2HTML_DEBUG=1    Show detailed error information
